REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT CANDACE CROCKETT DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE FACTS SUPPORTING EACH ELEMENT OF THIS CAUSE OF ACTION, INCLUDING FACTS GIVING RISE TO THE BELIEF TO SUPPORT ALLEGATIONS "ON INFORMATION AND BELIEF." DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL SHALL PROPERLY COMPLY WITH THE MEET AND CONFER PROVISIONS IN THE FUTURE. NEW ROUND OF MEET AND CONFER EFFORTS IS REQUIRED FOR EACH ITERATION OF THE PLEADINGS. ORDER FOR THE SAME SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE CHARLES F. HAINES, CLERK: N. WONG, NOT REPORTED (D501)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-12-2020 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-20-2020 Set For Trial On Sep-08-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-10-2020 Continued To Mar-04-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-10-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Andrew Westley, 415.362.2817 Plaintiff Leslie Young.
No other appearances.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT CANDACE CROCKETT DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is overruled, 10 days to answer. Order signed. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-13-2019 Continued To Jan-10-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CANDACE CROCKETT's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is CONTINUED TO JANUARY 10, 2020 ON COURT'S OWN MOTION. Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-25-2019 Continued To Jan-29-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-15-2019 Continued To Dec-13-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CANDACE CROCKETT DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is continued to December 13, 2019 for defendant to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide a courtesy copy of reply to department 501 no later than November 22, 2019 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. The Court received courtesy copies of the moving papers and opposition. Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-23-2019 Continued To Dec-11-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-09-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

Andrew Westley, Esq., 415-362-2817, appearing for Leslie Young, Plaintiff and opposing party.

David Riley, Esq., 415-981-5411, appearing for Candace Crockett, for Defendant and moving party.

Argued. Mr. Westly stated that the contested to the tentative ruling. Mr. Riley provided oral argument in support of his position.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CANDACE CROCKETT DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with leave to amend to allege facts supporting each element of this cause of action, including facts giving rise to the belief to support allegations "on information and belief." Defendant's counsel shall properly comply with the meet and confer provisions in the future. New round of meet and confer efforts is required for each iteration of the pleadings. Order for the same signed in open court. Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)
